notableEvents.label: Kyle Isbel plunked
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Isbel hit by pitch. Jonathan India to 3rd. Michael Massey to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas pops out to catcher Reese McGuire.

notableEvents.label: Chase Meidroth GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Chase Meidroth grounds into a double play, second baseman Jonathan India to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Reese McGuire out at 2nd. Chase Meidroth out at 1st.
